situational_context: Running comeback week 7: 10 structured runs since May 3 (47 days in). Run #11 skipped June 17 (baby appointment). Last run: Run #10 on June 14 (4.9 km, FC 136, load 18). ACWR normalized from 1.35 to 0.94 after 5-day absorption period — safe zone reached. HRV recovering strongly: overnight 41 ms (best in 3+ weeks), 7d avg 36, BALANCED. Training readiness 88, body battery 61 — both best of the period. Weight steady at 102.6 kg (3-week trend: 103.84 → 102.97 → 102.62). EXTREME HEAT WAVE: 34-40C forecast through June 25 — dominant constraint for outdoor sessions. E-bike remains primary modality (2 rides today, total 38 km, load 17). Vitamin D retest due ~July 2026. No new labs since Dec 2025.

recommendations.text: CANICULE 34-40C all week — apply heat protocol to all outdoor sessions: cap HR 10 bpm below normal targets, carry 500+ mL water, prefer shaded routes (Bois de Vincennes), abort immediately if nausea/dizziness/confusion. If ambient temp exceeds 38C at session start, convert to indoor or postpone.
recommendations.measurable: No heat-related symptoms during any session; all sessions completed or safely aborted

recommendations.text: ACWR resolved to 0.94 — running resumes tomorrow (Run #12, 4 km Z2). Keep FC max 128 bpm (heat-adjusted). Monitor post-run pain at 24h and 48h; confirm absence before Run #13 Wednesday.
recommendations.measurable: Run #12 completed without pain lasting >24h; ACWR stays in [0.8-1.3]

recommendations.text: Protein intake averaging 113 g/day vs 150 g target (75%). At 102.6 kg during running comeback + heat stress, adequate protein supports tissue repair and adaptation. Add an extra protein serving at dinner to close the gap.
recommendations.measurable: Average daily protein >= 130 g over next 7 days

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any heat-related symptom during or after outdoor session
markers_to_watch.reason: 34-40C all week; canicule conditions require strict monitoring of every outdoor session
